titleStmt.title: SII 36.7: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 7. (A.R. No. 7 of 1910.) MUḌIGOṆḌAM (Muḍigoṇḍa), KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Lakshmī Nārāyaṇaśvāmi temple.

summary.p: (Sādhāraṇa, ba., 3, Monday, Pūraṭṭādi = A.D. 1250, July 18, Monday).

Seems to refer to a sale of some plots of areca garden as tirunāmattukkāṇi to Dēśip-perumāḷ by the mahājanas of Durgaiyār Agaram in the presence of members of nagaram of Muḍikoṇḍachōḻapuram and all the local people (samasta-dēśi). The several pieces of land were earlier held by one Ayyappiḷḷai, who later turned-out to be a criminal and deserted the village. Consequently a fine was imposed on him and to realize land dues and fine, the mahājanas sold those pieces of land to the temple and agreed to pay all the taxes. The following irrigation canals and sub-canals in the locality are mentioned: Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-vāykkāl, Madhurāntaka-vadi and Ulōgamādēvi-vadi. The obstructers of the grant were cursed as rājadhrōhi, nāṭṭup-pakaiyaṉ, vaḷañjiyap-pakaivaṉ, mārga-drōhi and grāma-drōhi.
Published in E.C. (n), Vol. IV, No. Kol. 95.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pratāpaccakkaravatti pocaḷa śrī virasomicuratevaṉ prativirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷānikka sāthāraṇa samvaṟsarattu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nāḷ śrīmaṟ tuṟkaiyārakarattu Aśeṣamahājanaṅkaḷo muṭikoṇṭacoḻapuramāṉa deciuyyakkoṇṭa paṭṭaṇattu nakaramum samastadeśiyu muṉṉāka Ittecip peru tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta
kamuku nilammāvatu Ivvakarattu maturāntaka vatikku meṟku kulottuṅka coḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu nila nālu māvil meṟkaṭaiya nilamiru māvil teṟkaṭaiya Umiyūraiyaṉ perumāḷatikattil talaippāṭaka nilaṅ kāṇi muntiri l kiḻakkaṭaiya kamuku rūpāy 10kiḻakku (1/2) m Iṅke muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu nila nālu māvil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilamiraṇṭu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiyak kurovi Īcuratevaratikattiliraṇṭām pāṭa
ka nilamoru māvil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilamarai māvil teṟkaṭaiya nilaṅkāṇiyil vaṭakkaṭaiyak kamuku rūpāy 10m Iṅke Āṟāñ catirattu nila nālu māvil teṟkaṭaiya nila miraṇṭu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiyak kaliṅkaiyarkaḷatikatti liraṇṭām pāṭakattu nilamoru māvil meṟkaṭaiya nilamarai māvil meṟkaṭaiyak kamuku rūpāy 1kāṇim Ulōka mātevi vatikku meṟku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nila nālu māvil kiḻakkaṭaiya nila mira
ṇṭu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiya Iḻakkantiṟattārkaḷatikattilārum pāṭakanilamoru māvil teṟkaṭaiya Iḷaṅkamuku rūpāy mukkāṇi m Āka vaṅkippuṟattaiyappiḷḷai vilaikkuk koṇṭuṭaiyaṉā yivaṉutāyirunta kamukan toṭṭa rūpāy Orumā kiḻakku (1/2)m Inta Aiyappiḷḷai kuṟṟavāḷāṉā yoṭippokaiyāl daṇṭamūrmele viḻukaiyālitukku Inta Aśeṣa mahājanamkaḷumājñākrayamāka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟa Inellum poṉṉaṟak koṇṭu min=ta ni
lam viṟṟut tiruvāḻik kaṟkaḷ naṭṭukkuṭutomik kamuka nilam na māviṉ kīḻaraikkumi ṟaiyu nirkka

kūliyuñ cuṅkamu maṟṟu mepperppaṭṭatu mūrmeleyeṟaṭṭuk koṇṭu cantirātittavarai yiṟaiyiliyāka It tecip perumāḷukkuc celuttik kuṭukkak kaṭavoṅ Aśeṣamahājaṉamkaḷomippaṭikku virota niṉaittār rājaderāhi nāṭṭup pakaivaṉ vaḷañciyap pakaiyaṉ mārgaderāhi grāmaderāhi . § Itu kumarap peruvaṇikan kūttāṇṭaiyāṉa tiruvaraṅkadāsar dharmam
Digital edition of SII 36.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
